params.name: Soldier Island Dolls
params.description:
On Aug 15, 1939 AD, eight strangers received letters from the owner of a small island.
These small soldier dolls are an ominous symbol, often appearing where violent crimes occur, and the death of the victim is strange and coincides with the way a nursery rhyme describes it. Legend has it that these dolls were destroyed on a deserted island where no one survived, but now that they appear here, it might lead to another round of bloodshed...
